description: The Camorra barese is the informal name for organized crime operating in Bari and its province, distinct from the Neapolitan Camorra. It is a confederation of clans primarily involved in drug trafficking, smuggling, and extortion. Main clans include Strisciuglio, Capriati, and Parisi-Palermiti. The organization emerged in the late 1970s and became a major heroin trafficking hub in the 1980s-1990s.
